doc.architecture.industrial_skill_design.title: 工业级 Skill 设计 / Industrial Skill Design
doc.architecture.industrial_skill_design.summary_zh: 工业级 skill 应被设计成可复用能力包，而不是提示词片段。它必须定义触发、边界、执行协议、支撑材料、证据基础、控制机制、测试资产、量化指标和生命周期。
doc.architecture.industrial_skill_design.summary_en: An industrial skill should be a reusable capability package, not a prompt fragment. It must define triggers, boundaries, execution protocol, supporting materials, evidence base, controls, test assets, metrics, and lifecycle.

doc.metrics.quantitative_skill_metrics.title: 量化 Skill 指标 / Quantitative Skill Metrics
doc.metrics.quantitative_skill_metrics.summary_zh: Skill 指标应覆盖效果、触发、稳定性、过程、成本、长度、可控性和安全。核心实践是配对评估、重复 trial、轨迹记录和成本归一化。
doc.metrics.quantitative_skill_metrics.summary_en: Skill metrics should cover effectiveness, activation, stability, progress, cost, length, controllability, and safety. Core practices are paired eval, repeated trials, trajectory logging, and normalized cost.

doc.operations.knowledge_base_architectu.title: 知识库架构 / Knowledge Base Architecture
doc.operations.knowledge_base_architectu.summary_zh: skill-principle 使用短入口、短图谱节点、ID 引用、长文外链和结构化引用库，目标是在多轮 agent 工业化开发中节省上下文并保持可追溯性。
doc.operations.knowledge_base_architectu.summary_en: skill-principle uses short entrypoints, compact graph nodes, ID references, linked long docs, and structured references to save context and preserve traceability during multi-turn agent development.

doc.operations.local_retrieval_workflow.title: 本地检索工作流 / Local Retrieval Workflow
doc.operations.local_retrieval_workflow.summary_zh: skill-principle 的本地检索流程是先用生成索引定位候选 docs、nodes、assets 和 references，再用图谱邻接关系扩展上下文，最后只加载任务相关长文和执行资产。
doc.operations.local_retrieval_workflow.summary_en: skill-principle local retrieval first uses generated indexes to locate candidate docs, nodes, assets, and references; then expands through graph adjacency and loads only task-relevant long docs and execution assets.

doc.operations.skill_lifecycle_governanc.title: Skill 生命周期治理 / Skill Lifecycle Governance
doc.operations.skill_lifecycle_governanc.summary_zh: 工业级 skill 需要生命周期治理：草稿、候选、发布、监控、回归、弃用和回滚。每个阶段都应有门禁、证据和可追溯记录。
doc.operations.skill_lifecycle_governanc.summary_en: Industrial skills need lifecycle governance: draft, candidate, release, monitoring, regression, deprecation, and rollback. Each stage needs gates, evidence, and traceability.

doc.operations.skill_lifecycle_managemen.title: Skill 生命周期管理 / Skill Lifecycle Management
doc.operations.skill_lifecycle_managemen.summary_zh: 工业级 skill 需要从草稿、候选、发布、观测、回滚、弃用到演进形成闭环。核心机制是版本清单、发布门禁、注册表、运行轨迹、回滚预案、弃用元数据和证据门控更新。
doc.operations.skill_lifecycle_managemen.summary_en: Industrial skills need a lifecycle loop from draft, candidate, release, observation, rollback, deprecation, to evolution. Core mechanisms are version manifests, release gates, registries, runtime traces, rollback plans, deprecation metadata, and evidence-gated updates.

doc.research.evidence_driven_skill_resea.title: 证据驱动的 Skill 资料搜集 / Evidence-Driven Skill Research
doc.research.evidence_driven_skill_resea.summary_zh: 依赖外部事实的 skill 必须先做可控广度和深度的资料搜集：建立来源花名册、多角度 fan-out、迭代深化、可靠性分级、三角验证，最后让每条结论可溯源到证据 id。
doc.research.evidence_driven_skill_resea.summary_en: A fact-dependent skill must first run breadth- and depth-controlled research: build a source roster, fan out across angles, iteratively deepen, grade reliability, triangulate, and make every conclusion trace to an evidence id.

doc.research.skill_engineering_reading_l.title: Skill 工程扩展阅读 / Skill Engineering Reading List
doc.research.skill_engineering_reading_l.summary_zh: skill 设计、测试和 TDD 的扩展参考文献，按主题注解；用于深化触发、工具规范、评估、轨迹/变异/契约测试和可靠性的设计。
doc.research.skill_engineering_reading_l.summary_en: Annotated extended references for skill design, testing, and TDD; deepens triggers, tool specs, evaluation, trajectory/mutation/contract testing, and reliability.

doc.research.skill_ops_reading_list.title: Skill 运维与治理扩展阅读 / Skill Ops and Governance Reading List
doc.research.skill_ops_reading_list.summary_zh: skill 量化指标、可观测性、生命周期/发布、治理安全与上下文记忆的扩展参考文献，按主题注解。
doc.research.skill_ops_reading_list.summary_en: Annotated extended references for skill metrics, observability, lifecycle/release, governance/security, and context/memory.

doc.research.skill_reference_library.title: 公共 Skill 仓库参考库 / Public Skill Reference Library
doc.research.skill_reference_library.summary_zh: skill-principle 维护一个最著名、用户量最多的公共 skill 仓库注册表，需要时按需下载某个具体 skill 作为学习参考——学它的内容组织和重点，但工业级 skill 在结构上要考虑得更多。
doc.research.skill_reference_library.summary_en: skill-principle keeps a registry of the most popular public skill repositories and fetches a specific skill on demand as a learning reference — learn its content and emphasis, but an industrial skill must consider more structure.

doc.testing.skill_testing_process.title: Skill 测试流程 / Skill Testing Process
doc.testing.skill_testing_process.summary_zh: Skill 测试应使用分层结构：结构检查、契约测试、组件测试、轨迹评估、真实任务评估、配对评估和持续回归。不要只看单次最终输出。
doc.testing.skill_testing_process.summary_en: Skill testing should be layered: structural checks, contract tests, component tests, trajectory evals, real-task evals, paired evals, and continuous regression. Do not rely on one final-output sample.

doc.testing.tdd_for_skill_development.title: Skill TDD 规划 / TDD for Skill Development
doc.testing.tdd_for_skill_development.summary_zh: Skill TDD 是 eval-driven development 的特化：先把目标行为写成失败任务、验收标准、评分器和轨迹断言，再实现最小 skill，最后重构结构和测试。
doc.testing.tdd_for_skill_development.summary_en: Skill TDD is a specialization of eval-driven development: write failing tasks, acceptance criteria, graders, and trajectory assertions first; then implement the minimal skill and refactor structure and tests.

anti_pattern.prompted_architecture.summary_zh: 把控制流、权限、安全和验收都写在长提示词里，导致关键行为依赖模型记忆而非确定性机制。
anti_pattern.prompted_architecture.summary_en: Places control flow, permissions, safety, and acceptance in long prompts, making critical behavior depend on model adherence instead of deterministic mechanisms.

concept.execution_protocol.summary_zh: skill 给 agent 的可执行工作流，包括预检、步骤、工具调用、失败处理、验收和汇报。
concept.execution_protocol.summary_en: The executable workflow a skill gives an agent: preflight, steps, tool calls, failure handling, acceptance, and reporting.

concept.skill.summary_zh: 面向 agent 的可复用能力包，包含触发条件、行为协议、支撑材料、控制边界、测试资产、量化指标和生命周期规则。
concept.skill.summary_en: A reusable agent capability package with trigger rules, behavior protocol, supporting materials, control boundaries, test assets, metrics, and lifecycle rules.

concept.skill_release_manifest.summary_zh: 记录 skill 版本、变更类型、兼容性、测试结果、指标、风险、依赖和回滚入口。
concept.skill_release_manifest.summary_en: Records skill version, change type, compatibility, tests, metrics, risk, dependencies, and rollback entrypoints.

concept.test_asset.summary_zh: 用于验证 skill 的任务集、fixtures、轨迹断言、评分器、回归样例、失败样例和环境模拟器。
concept.test_asset.summary_en: Task sets, fixtures, trajectory assertions, graders, regression cases, failure cases, and environment simulators used to validate a skill.

concept.trigger.summary_zh: 定义 agent 何时应该使用 skill、何时不该使用、哪些邻近任务容易误触发。
concept.trigger.summary_en: Defines when an agent should use a skill, when it should not, and which adjacent tasks cause false activation.

metric.activation_precision.summary_zh: agent 在目标任务中正确触发 skill，并避免邻近非目标任务误触发的能力。
metric.activation_precision.summary_en: The agent's ability to activate a skill on target tasks while avoiding false activation on adjacent non-target tasks.

metric.claim_traceability_rate.summary_zh: skill 输出中可追溯到具体 evidence id 的事实性声明比例，用来量化证据基础的完整性。
metric.claim_traceability_rate.summary_en: Share of factual claims in a skill's output that trace to a specific evidence id, quantifying evidence-base completeness.

metric.cost_per_success.summary_zh: 完成一次成功任务所需的 token、工具调用、时间或费用，用来判断 skill 是否值得。
metric.cost_per_success.summary_en: Tokens, tool calls, time, or money required per successful task, used to judge whether a skill is worth its cost.

metric.false_negative_rate.summary_zh: 目标任务中未触发 skill 的比例，用来发现描述过窄或入口不可检索。
metric.false_negative_rate.summary_en: The proportion of target tasks where a skill is not activated, revealing overly narrow descriptions or weak discoverability.

metric.false_positive_rate.summary_zh: 非目标任务中错误触发 skill 的比例，用来发现描述过宽或邻近 skill 混淆。
metric.false_positive_rate.summary_en: The proportion of non-target tasks that incorrectly activate a skill, revealing broad descriptions or adjacent-skill confusion.

metric.lifecycle_trace_coverage.summary_zh: 衡量发布、运行、失败、回滚和弃用事件是否都有可追溯 trace、版本和指标记录。
metric.lifecycle_trace_coverage.summary_en: Measures whether release, run, failure, rollback, and deprecation events have traceable records, versions, and metrics.

metric.loaded_context_tokens.summary_zh: 一次运行实际加载的入口、节点、文档、引用和工具输出 token 数。
metric.loaded_context_tokens.summary_en: The tokens actually loaded from entrypoints, nodes, docs, references, and tool outputs during one run.

metric.marginal_lift.summary_zh: with-skill 相比 without-skill 或旧版本 skill 的成功率、质量或成本改善。
metric.marginal_lift.summary_en: Improvement in success, quality, or cost for with-skill compared to without-skill or an older skill version.

metric.mutation_score.summary_zh: 测试套件杀死故意破坏的 skill mutant 的比例，用来衡量测试是否真的约束行为。
metric.mutation_score.summary_en: The proportion of deliberately corrupted skill mutants killed by the test suite, measuring whether tests actually constrain behavior.

metric.pass_k.summary_zh: 同一任务重复运行 k 次时的成功模式，用来衡量非确定性下的可靠性。
metric.pass_k.summary_en: Success behavior across k repeated trials of the same task, measuring reliability under stochastic execution.

metric.policy_violation_rate.summary_zh: 违反工具、路径、权限、人工确认或输出契约的运行比例。
metric.policy_violation_rate.summary_en: The share of runs that violate tool, path, permission, human-gate, or output contracts.

metric.progress_rate.summary_zh: 即使最终失败，也记录 skill 完成了哪些阶段，用于定位失败点和部分收益。
metric.progress_rate.summary_en: Records which stages a skill completed even when the final task fails, enabling failure localization and partial-credit analysis.

metric.regression_escape_rate.summary_zh: 曾经进入回归套件的问题在新版本中再次逃逸的比例，用来衡量测试套件防退化能力。
metric.regression_escape_rate.summary_en: The proportion of known regression cases that escape again in a new version, measuring anti-regression strength.

metric.release_gate_pass_rate.summary_zh: 候选版本通过必需门禁项的比例，用于衡量发布准备度而非最终效果。
metric.release_gate_pass_rate.summary_en: The proportion of required release gate checks passed by a candidate, measuring readiness rather than final effectiveness.

metric.rollback_readiness.summary_zh: 衡量每个发布候选是否有已知好版本、恢复步骤、验证命令和受影响状态清单。
metric.rollback_readiness.summary_en: Measures whether each release candidate has a known-good version, recovery steps, validation commands, and affected-state inventory.

metric.source_coverage.summary_zh: 实际搜集到的相关来源占应覆盖来源空间（按类别和角度）的比例，用来衡量资料搜集的广度是否充分。
metric.source_coverage.summary_en: Share of the intended source space (by class and angle) actually collected, measuring whether research breadth is sufficient.

metric.task_success_rate.summary_zh: 在定义好的任务集上，skill 帮助 agent 达成验收标准的比例。
metric.task_success_rate.summary_en: The proportion of tasks where the skill helps the agent meet acceptance criteria on a defined task set.

metric.tool_call_correctness.summary_zh: 衡量 agent 是否调用正确工具、传入正确参数，并在错误返回时采取正确恢复路径。
metric.tool_call_correctness.summary_en: Measures whether the agent calls the right tools with correct arguments and follows proper recovery paths on tool errors.

pattern.progressive_loading.summary_zh: 用入口、短节点、主题文档和引用库分层加载，保证多轮开发时上下文保持可控。
pattern.progressive_loading.summary_en: Loads entrypoints, compact nodes, topic docs, and references in layers to keep context controlled during multi-turn development.

pattern.skill_registry.summary_zh: 用短 metadata 管理发现、版本、分发、信任、依赖、共享资产、弃用和回滚指针。
pattern.skill_registry.summary_en: Uses compact metadata to manage discovery, versions, distribution, trust, dependencies, shared assets, deprecation, and rollback pointers.

pillar.design.summary_zh: 定义 skill 的边界、触发、执行协议、支撑材料、控制边界和生命周期，使它能稳定复用而不是依赖临时提示词。
pillar.design.summary_en: Defines skill boundaries, triggers, execution protocol, supporting materials, control boundaries, and lifecycle for stable reuse.

pillar.kb_architecture.summary_zh: 用短入口、短节点、ID 引用和长文外链，让多轮 agent 开发只加载当前任务需要的最小上下文。
pillar.kb_architecture.summary_en: Uses short entrypoints, compact nodes, ID references, and linked long docs so multi-turn agents load minimal relevant context.

pillar.lifecycle.summary_zh: 管理 skill 从草稿、候选、发布、观测、回滚、弃用到证据门控演进的完整闭环。
pillar.lifecycle.summary_en: Manages the loop from draft, candidate, release, observation, rollback, deprecation, to evidence-gated evolution.

pillar.metrics.summary_zh: 用效果、触发、稳定性、成本、长度、可控性和安全指标衡量 skill，而不是只看单次主观感觉。
pillar.metrics.summary_en: Measures skills through effectiveness, activation, stability, cost, length, controllability, and safety instead of one-off subjective impressions.

pillar.research.summary_zh: 为依赖外部事实的 skill 建立可控广度和深度的资料搜集流程：来源花名册、多角度 fan-out、迭代深化、可靠性分级、三角验证和声明可溯源。
pillar.research.summary_en: Builds a breadth- and depth-controlled data-collection process for fact-dependent skills: source roster, multi-angle fan-out, iterative deepening, reliability grading, triangulation, and claim traceability.

pillar.tdd.summary_zh: 先定义失败任务、验收标准和评分器，再写最小 skill 行为，最后重构文档、脚本、测试和指标。
pillar.tdd.summary_en: Defines failing tasks, acceptance criteria, and graders first; implements minimal skill behavior; then refactors docs, scripts, tests, and metrics.

pillar.testing.summary_zh: 用分层测试、轨迹评估、对照实验、回归套件和稳定环境来验证 skill 的真实效果和可控性。
pillar.testing.summary_en: Uses layered tests, trajectory evals, paired experiments, regression suites, and stable environments to validate skill quality and control.

principle.claim_evidence_traceability.summary_zh: skill 输出中每条事实性声明都必须能追溯到具体证据 id，区分来源观察与自身推断，没有证据的声明只能算草稿。
principle.claim_evidence_traceability.summary_en: Every factual claim in a skill's output must trace to a specific evidence id, separating source observation from inference; an unsupported claim is only a draft.

principle.executable_acceptance.summary_zh: 每个重要行为都应映射到可执行测试、可检查状态、轨迹断言或明确 rubric。
principle.executable_acceptance.summary_en: Every important behavior should map to executable tests, checkable state, trajectory assertions, or explicit rubrics.

principle.id_references.summary_zh: 上下游关系只存稳定 id，避免重复长文本，支持 agent 逐级检索和按需展开。
principle.id_references.summary_en: Store upstream and downstream relationships as stable ids to avoid text duplication and support stepwise retrieval.

principle.progressive_disclosure.summary_zh: 先暴露短描述和入口，只有任务需要时才加载完整 skill、参考文档、模板或脚本。
principle.progressive_disclosure.summary_en: Expose short descriptions and entrypoints first; load full skills, references, templates, or scripts only when needed.

principle.short_node_budget.summary_zh: 图谱节点只放短摘要和 id 关系，不放长解释；长内容通过 doc_ids 和 reference_ids 按需加载。
principle.short_node_budget.summary_en: Graph nodes contain only short summaries and id relationships; long content is loaded on demand through doc_ids and reference_ids.

procedure.deprecation_policy.summary_zh: 用机器可读元数据声明 deprecated_at、sunset_at、replacement_id、severity 和迁移说明。
procedure.deprecation_policy.summary_en: Uses machine-readable metadata for deprecated_at, sunset_at, replacement_id, severity, and migration guidance.

procedure.evidence_gated_update.summary_zh: 只有通过验收、回归、归因和成本检查的成功发现才能进入 skill，避免噪音污染未来上下文。
procedure.evidence_gated_update.summary_en: Only successful discoveries that pass acceptance, regression, attribution, and cost checks can update a skill.

procedure.iterative_deepening.summary_zh: 按信息气味逐步深入高价值来源，自我评估是否已饱和，循环检索-评估-再检索直到边际收益变小，控制深度而非一次到底。
procedure.iterative_deepening.summary_en: Dives deeper into high-value sources by information scent, self-assesses saturation, and loops retrieve-evaluate-retrieve until marginal gain falls, controlling depth instead of one-shot diving.

procedure.paired_skill_eval.summary_zh: 固定模型、任务、权限和环境，只比较 with-skill 与 without-skill 或两个 skill 版本的差异。
procedure.paired_skill_eval.summary_en: Hold model, tasks, permissions, and environment constant; compare with-skill vs without-skill or two skill versions.

procedure.production_feedback_loop.summary_zh: 把生产失败、误触发、高成本和人工纠正转成回归样例、指标阈值或 skill 修订。
procedure.production_feedback_loop.summary_en: Turns production failures, false activations, high cost, and human corrections into regression cases, thresholds, or skill revisions.

procedure.red_green_refactor_for_skill.summary_zh: 先写失败任务和验收，再写最小 skill 指令/脚本让它通过，最后重构结构、文档和测试。
procedure.red_green_refactor_for_skill.summary_en: Write failing task and acceptance first, implement minimal instructions/scripts to pass, then refactor structure, docs, and tests.

procedure.regression_suite.summary_zh: 保存失败样例、边界样例、邻近误触发样例和生产问题，每次 skill 变更后重跑。
procedure.regression_suite.summary_en: Preserve failure cases, boundary cases, adjacent false-trigger cases, and production issues; rerun them after each skill change.

procedure.release_gate.summary_zh: 发布前检查结构、触发、行为、回归、成本、安全、版本和回滚，避免未验证 skill 进入复用库。
procedure.release_gate.summary_en: Checks structure, triggers, behavior, regressions, cost, safety, versioning, and rollback before release.

procedure.rollback_plan.summary_zh: 发布前定义已知好版本、触发条件、恢复步骤、验证方式和受影响的 registry、缓存、模板或配置。
procedure.rollback_plan.summary_en: Defines known-good version, triggers, recovery steps, validation, and affected registry, cache, template, or config state before release.

procedure.search_fan_out.summary_zh: 用查询分解、同义扩展和多角度并行搜索扩大资料搜集的广度，每个角度独立命中不同来源，再合并去重。
procedure.search_fan_out.summary_en: Widens collection breadth with query decomposition, synonym expansion, and multi-angle parallel search, each angle hitting different sources before merge and dedup.

procedure.skill_deprecation.summary_zh: 当 skill 过时、冲突、成本过高或被更好版本替代时，记录替代路径并停止自动触发。
procedure.skill_deprecation.summary_en: When a skill is outdated, conflicting, too costly, or superseded, record migration paths and disable auto-activation.

procedure.source_reliability_grading.summary_zh: 用双轴（来源可靠性 × 信息可信度）和证据质量分级评估每条来源和情报，给低可靠或环境相关的来源打上明确标记。
procedure.source_reliability_grading.summary_en: Grades each source and claim on a dual axis (source reliability x information credibility) plus evidence-quality levels, flagging low-reliability or environment-specific sources explicitly.

procedure.source_roster.summary_zh: 为主题建立带类型、取向、可靠性和用途画像的来源清单，确保资料搜集覆盖多个来源类别而不是单一渠道。
procedure.source_roster.summary_en: Builds a profiled inventory of sources with type, orientation, reliability, and usage so collection spans multiple source classes rather than one channel.

procedure.test_pyramid.summary_zh: 底层做结构和静态检查，中层做工具/fixture 集成，顶层做真实任务和多次 trial。
procedure.test_pyramid.summary_en: Use structure and static checks at the bottom, tool/fixture integration in the middle, and real tasks with repeated trials at the top.

procedure.trajectory_eval.summary_zh: 评估 agent 的消息、工具调用、参数、环境状态变化和最终输出，而不是只看最终文本。
procedure.trajectory_eval.summary_en: Evaluates messages, tool calls, arguments, environment state changes, and final output instead of only final text.

procedure.triangulation.summary_zh: 用多源、多方法交叉印证关键结论，对相互冲突的来源显式记录冲突而不是合并，提升资料搜集结果的可信度。
procedure.triangulation.summary_en: Cross-checks key conclusions across multiple sources and methods, recording conflicts explicitly instead of merging them, raising the trustworthiness of collected evidence.

technique.contract_test.summary_zh: 把 skill 的输入、输出、工具参数、文件边界和错误路径写成可验证契约。
technique.contract_test.summary_en: Defines verifiable contracts for skill inputs, outputs, tool arguments, file boundaries, and error paths.

technique.metamorphic_test.summary_zh: 当唯一正确答案难定义时，用输入变换前后的输出关系验证 skill 行为。
technique.metamorphic_test.summary_en: When a single correct answer is hard to define, validate skill behavior through relations across transformed inputs.

technique.mutation_test.summary_zh: 故意破坏 skill 的触发、边界、步骤或示例，检查测试套件是否能捕获退化。
technique.mutation_test.summary_en: Deliberately corrupt triggers, boundaries, steps, or examples to see whether the test suite detects degraded behavior.

goal.industrial_design.title_zh: 工业级 skill 的设计思路和标准

goal.testing_process.title_zh: skill 的测试流程应该如何设计

goal.tdd_planning.title_zh: TDD 测试应该如何规划来测试 skill

goal.quant_metrics.title_zh: 量化 skill 指标应该如何实践

goal.low_context_kb.title_zh: 低上下文、多轮工业化开发知识库基础设施

goal.lifecycle_management.title_zh: 工业级 skill 生命周期、发布、版本、观测和回滚

goal.research_collection.title_zh: 工业级 skill 的资料搜集、证据基础和来源可溯源
